file_summary: This file provides functions to parse source code files and extract symbols using tree-sitter or plain text chunking.

functions.name: init
functions.summary: Initializes the language registry with supported languages and their query patterns.

functions.name: ParseFile
functions.summary: Parses a source code file from disk and extracts its symbols.

functions.name: ParseBytes
functions.summary: Parses source code bytes and extracts symbols using tree-sitter or plain text chunking.

functions.name: SupportedExtensions
functions.summary: Returns a list of supported file extensions for parsing.

functions.name: detectLang
functions.summary: Detects the language of a file based on its extension.

functions.name: isPlainText
functions.summary: Checks if a file should be treated as plain text for chunking.

functions.name: extractSymbols
functions.summary: Extracts symbols from a tree-sitter parse tree using language-specific queries.

functions.name: firstLine
functions.summary: Returns the first non-empty line of a string, truncated to 200 characters if necessary.

functions.name: chunkPlainText
functions.summary: Chunks plain text into symbols by splitting it into lines and creating chunks of a fixed size.
